ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "query" INTEGER /* Query identifier associated with the experiment */,
  "condition" INTEGER /* Condition applied to the experiment (e.g., KNN range) */,
  "knn_score" REAL /* KNN score resulting from the experiment */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON object containing the hyperparameters of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., 'running', 'completed', 'failed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this metric belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time taken for the experiment execution */,
  "visited_objects" INTEGER /* Number of objects visited during the experiment evaluation */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy score of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision score of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall score of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "roc_auc" REAL /* ROC AUC score of the model */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* JSON object representing the confusion matrix */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, ML engineer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., 'admin', 'user') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the dataset is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
